title: Halimiocistus sahucii
intro: Halimiocistus sahucii, also known as Sahuc's halimiocistus, is a small, shrubby plant belonging to the family Cistaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Mediterranean herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Halimiocistus sahucii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Halimiocistus sahucii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of conditions, including digestive disorders and skin irritations.
